title: ELMÉLETI/GYAKORLATI JÁRVÁNYVÉDELMI KÉPZÉSEK GAZDÁKNAK
description: A training program for poultry farmers on both theoretical and practical biosecurity measures aimed at preventing pathogen entry and ensuring effective disease control in poultry production. The courses, delivered by veterinarians at the Valencian Centre for Poultry Quality and Feed (CECAV) under the EU-funded NetPoulSafe project, include lectures, hands-on exercises on cleaning and disinfection, and discussions on alternative interventions such as phage therapy.
